stages.captured: The mission exists in the lossless official UK catalogue.
stages.identity-verified: The official mission ID and name match a canonical mission record.
stages.requirements-mapped: Every published requirement and chance key used by the mission has been mapped into the canonical dispatch model or explicitly classified as not applicable.
stages.operationally-verified: Conditional requirements, probabilities, patients, personnel, relationships, variants and other operational mechanics have reproducible evidence.
stages.fully-canonical: The mission has completed a final evidence-completeness audit and can be treated as fully normalized operational intelligence.

notes: Official identity, Fire Station prerequisite, Fire engine requirement, base reward and follow-up relationships are represented.
